lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear and small cosmetic blemishes. All major mechanical and electrical systems are functional.

Looking for an affordable project or a budget-friendly way to get on the road? This car is a diamond in the rough! While it shows heavy wear and will require some mechanical attention and cosmetic TLC, it offers a great foundation for a restoration enthusiast or someone looking for a low-cost start. It's priced to move and ready for its next chapter!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly 'as-is.' It will require significant mechanical work and cosmetic restoration to be roadworthy again. The engine has a persistent misfire and there are visible fluid leaks underneath. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, significant rust on the wheel arches, and fading paint throughout. The interior has sustained heavy wear, including torn seating and a non-functional climate control system. This car is best suited for a dedicated project or as a source for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine is currently running roughly with a persistent check engine light, and the transmission exhibits harsh shifting. Externally, there is noticeable body damage including several large dents, significant paint oxidation, and visible rust on the rocker panels. The interior shows heavy wear, with multiple tears in the seats and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended only for those looking for a major project or a source for parts.
The car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive cosmetic damage. Major repairs are required for it to be roadworthy.
Fair condition.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and interior refinement. It represents a superior balance of utility and value, offering the discerning driver a premium experience without the new-car premium. Detailed records confirm a history of consistent upkeep, making this an exceptional acquisition for those who demand quality and longevity.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and she’s been an absolute joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. Everything runs smoothly, and it’s ready for its next adventure with you! Come take a look, you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically robust example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with its signature individual throttle bodies. The powertrain is mated to a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Notable preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS service and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. The chassis remains composed with updated bushings and sharp steering rack feedback. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the drivetrain remains potent, exhibiting smooth power delivery up to the 8,000 RPM redline. A turn-key performance machine for the discerning driver.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a perfect blend of luxury and performance for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use, while the leather interior remains supple and smoke-free. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of premium tires. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, functions exactly as intended. It drives smoothly, shifts crisply, and provides a quiet, refined cabin experience. This is a turn-key vehicle ready for daily commutes or long-distance touring.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of performance and lasting value. It has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring mechanical reliability and a refined driving experience. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to quality upkeep, presenting in a condition that meets the rigorous expectations of our clientele. We invite you to experience the caliber of this offering firsthand.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and reliability. A prime example of enduring engineering, it offers a sophisticated profile and consistent performance, representing an outstanding acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes both performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a fantastic car. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. It’s definitely been well-loved and well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road with a new owner today. It runs beautifully and is just waiting for its next adventure—come see it for yourself!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. The chassis has been enhanced with essential subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings to maintain structural rigidity under lateral load. Recent mechanical service includes a comprehensive Vanos system overhaul and precise valve clearance adjustments, ensuring the valvetrain operates at peak efficiency. With a firm suspension geometry featuring MacPherson struts up front and a multi-link rear, this M3 offers surgical turn-in and exceptional mid-corner stability. It is a
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday utility. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you’ll find a clean, smoke-free cabin with premium upholstery that has held its shape and texture beautifully. All electronics, including the infotainment and climate control systems, function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance, ensuring a smooth, responsive drive. It’s a reliable, attractive car that has many miles of enjoyment left to offer. Perfect for someone looking for quality without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, the automobile remains in robust mechanical standing with a clean, professional aesthetic profile. The interior reflects careful stewardship, offering a refined driving environment for the discerning owner. This is a premier opportunity to acquire a reliable, high-caliber vehicle at a competitive market valuation.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and reliability. This specimen has been curated to meet our exacting standards, ensuring a superior driving experience for the discerning owner. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal remain notably robust, representing a significant value proposition in the current market.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a gem. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next adventure! I’ve taken great care of it, so you can just hop in and go. If you're looking for something reliable that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’d love to see it go to a good home!

This 997.1 Carrera features the iconic 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. Mechanically sound, the engine exhibits strong compression across all cylinders with no bore scoring noted. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and refreshed control arm bushings. Braking is handled by four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors, providing consistent pedal feel and zero fade. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-maintained driver’s car, the drivetrain is robust, featuring an upgraded IMS bearing for long-term reliability. A purist-spec 911 optimized for visceral feedback and mechanical engagement.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between value and quality, presenting in reliable, well-maintained condition. The exterior finish holds a deep luster, showing only the typical minor road chips expected from light use. Inside, the upholstery is clean and well-preserved, with all electronics and climate controls functioning flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a consistent service history and a recent multi-point inspection. It drives straight and quiet, offering a dependable and comfortable experience for its next owner. A complete set of service records is available, confirming its history of careful ownership.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, the automobile offers a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance, this unit stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. We invite you to experience the refined handling and sophisticated presence of this well-preserved example.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, the automobile has been serviced to ensure reliable performance and long-term durability. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing superior engineering with exceptional value in today’s market.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? This beauty is in great shape and is totally ready for its next adventure! It drives like a dream and has been my trusty companion, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it. It’s clean, dependable, and honestly just a joy to be in. I’d love for you to come by, take it for a spin, and see for yourself how smooth it feels on the road!
